subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in London | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-3661
body: Following yesterday's call, the siamese effort in London needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Amelia Earhart seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-3661. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
